message:
feat(runtime): Add pytest stub and traceback stub modules

- Register pytest module in import registry
- Add pytest.zig stub for test compatibility
- Add traceback_stub.zig for AOT traceback field access
- Update stdlib_modules_gen.zig with new module entries

files.patch:
